name: autonomous-ai-agents
description: Claude Code's on-ramp to Jack's fleet-coordination primitives. v0.1: fleet-identity skill (who runs Wings/Zoe/Mara/Kopi). v0.2: Hermes messaging bridge via native 'hermes mcp serve' (10 tools across Telegram/Discord/Slack/WhatsApp/Signal/Matrix) + hermes-bridge companion skill. Hermes (Wings) + Zolivier (Zoe) are the shared async-messaging substrate for the thinker fleet (Claude, Gemini, ChatGPT); this plugin wires Claude Code's side of Wings.

hermes.description: Nous Research Hermes Agent messaging bridge — async-messaging substrate across Telegram/Discord/Slack/WhatsApp/Signal/Matrix. Exposes conversations_list, conversation_get, messages_read, messages_send, attachments_fetch, channels_list, events_poll, events_wait, permissions_list_open, permissions_respond. Requires `hermes` CLI on PATH (install: https://hermes-agent.nousresearch.com).
